channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: US arranges flights to bring Americans out of Lebanon as others seek escape
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — U.S.-arranged flights have brought about 250 Americans and their relatives out of Lebanon this week during escalated fighting between Israel and Hezbollah, while thousands of others still there face airstrikes and diminishing commercial flights.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER, MATTHEW LEE and JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penn. Republican Senate candidate David McCormick: 'I'm the underdog'
item.description: “I’m the underdog,” David McCormick told NewsNation’s Leland Vittert in a one-on-one interview for “On Balance.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Harris campaigns with Liz Cheney at the GOP's birthplace while Trump rallies in Michigan
item.description: RIPON, Wis. (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris rallied with Republican Liz Cheney in the birthplace of the modern Republican Party on Thursday as the pair delivered a double-barreled denunciation of GOP nominee Donald Trump as a dire threat to democracy.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Politics over Humanity? How Hurricane Helene impacts the political field
item.description: Politics over Humanity? How Hurricane Helene impacts the Political field as the race to the White House is weeks away.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump attorneys argue Jack Smith's obstruction charges be dismissed citing Supreme Court's 'Fischer' decision
item.description: Trump attorneys filed a memo Thursday in support of their motion to dismiss all charges brought against the former president by Special Counsel Jack Smith.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Firefighters union won't endorse in Trump-Harris race
item.description: The International Association of Fire Fighters (IAFF) announced Thursday it would not endorse a candidate in this year's presidential race, becoming the second major union to do so in recent weeks.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Ex-NYPD boss rejected discipline for cops who raided bar where owner says he was 'extorted'
item.description: In late August, shortly before resigning under a cloud of scandal, New York City’s former police commissioner blocked the discipline of three officers involved in a melee outside a Brooklyn juice bar.
item.dc:creator: Jake Offenhartz, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: LIVE: Pennsylvania US Senate Debate: Bob Casey, Dave McCormick appear for first debate
item.description: It's Debate Night in Pennsylvania with Bob Casey and Dave McCormick going head-to-head for the first time.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Judge rules that Biden admin violated environmental law in halt of border wall construction
item.description: A federal judge ruled in favor of two Arizona ranchers who claimed that they suffered environmental impacts as a result of the influx of migrants under the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taxpayers in 24 states will be able to file their returns directly with the IRS in 2025
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The IRS is expanding its program that allows people to file their taxes directly with the agency for free.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minneapolis mayor, City Council clash on homeless shelter funding
item.description: The Minneapolis City Council is launching an inquiry into the mayor’s financial reporting practices following a dispute over funding for a homeless shelter.
item.dc:creator: Estelle Timar-Wilcox, MPR News

item.title: Trump and the federal election case against him: Key passages from prosecutors' latest court filing
item.description: New court papers in Donald Trump’s federal 2020 election interference case pull back the curtain on his conversations with family members, former Vice President Mike Pence and other close advisers in the weeks leading up to the attack on the U.S. Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Alanna Durkin Richer And Farnoush Amiri, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump's campaign says he raised $160 million in September, ended month with $283 million banked
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Former President Donald Trump raised $160 million for his campaign in September and entered October with $283 million in the bank for the campaign's final sprint, his aides announced.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Melania Trump says she supports abortion rights, putting her at odds with the GOP
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Melania Trump revealed her support for abortion rights Thursday ahead of the release of her upcoming memoir, exposing a stark contrast with her husband, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump, on the crucial election issue.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What's next after prosecutors reveal new evidence in Trump's 2020 election interference case
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith has provided a road map for how prosecutors hope to prove their case charging Donald Trump with an illegal scheme to overturn his 2020 election loss — if it ever gets to trial.
item.dc:creator: Alanna Durkin Richer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Over 1.7M migrants who could pose national security risk arrived in US during Biden admin: report
item.description: More than 1.7 million migrants who are identified as "special interest aliens" have been encountered at the border under the Biden administration, according to a House report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Politics Friday: Minnesota’s 2nd Congressional District Debate
item.description: Minnesota’s 2nd Congressional District is one of the most closely watched races in the nation. Coming up Friday at noon, MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst moderates a debate between Democratic Rep. Angie Craig and Republican candidate Joe Teirab.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Biden student loan forgiveness plan gets win in Georgia court
item.description: President Joe Biden’s student debt relief plan was dealt a win by a Georgia judge this week by removing one Republican challenger and letting the program advance for now after a temporarily restraining order expires.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Programming alert: NewsNation to feature PA Senate race tonight
item.description: NewsNation will have live coverage of the Pennsylvania senate debate between Bob Casey and David McCormick.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Trump targets Biden, Harris over federal response to hurricane: 'Incompetently managed'
item.description: As President Biden spends a second straight day in the Southeast surveying storm damage from Hurricane Helene, former President Trump blasts President Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris over the federal government's relief efforts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Giuliani's daughter: ‘The biggest threat to our country is Trump’
item.description: Former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani's (R) daughter said she thinks the biggest threat to America is former President Trump. Caroline Giuliani has spoken out in recent days about her father’s entanglements with Trump and the upcoming election.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Helene scrambles politics in 3 battleground states
item.description: The 500-mile-long path of destruction cut by Hurricane Helene has scrambled the politics of three battleground states that could determine control of the White House and Senate: North Carolina, Georgia and Florida.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Valadao, Salas spar over issues in California debate
item.description: David Valadao and Rudy Salas debated over issues voters said are of the most importance to them during a debate.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, NewsNation

item.title: Virginia Senate debate: Clinton ex-running mate Kaine, GOP challenger Cao spar on immigration, DEI in military
item.description: U.S. Sen. Tim Kaine of Virginia and Republican challenger Hung Cao clashed on immigration, student loans and mass deportation during their only debate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Debate performance gives Vance 2028 White House boost
item.description: Sen. JD Vance’s (R-Ohio) debate performance is giving him a shot in the arm to become a leading 2028 presidential contender no matter what happens in November between former President Trump and Vice President Harris.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge unseals new Trump Jan. 6 election interference evidence
item.description: Prosecutors provided the most detailed look yet at their election interference case against former President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson and Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Habitat for Humanity volunteers continue Carter’s legacy on 100th birthday
item.description: For 40 years, the project has brought together volunteers, celebrities and elected officials to build homes and highlight the need for affordable housing.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Thamer, MPR News

item.title: Vance and Walz are both veterans. Here's what it means to have a vet VP
item.description: For the first time since 1996, both major parties have picked a veteran for vice president — a fact that some veterans' groups are hoping it leads to greater understanding of military and vet issues.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence, MPR News

item.title: A century of Jimmy Carter: Longest-living former president turns 100
item.description: In 1998, at the ripe age of 74, former President Carter put some of his thoughts about getting older to paper. "The virtues of aging," Carter wrote in a book that year, "include both the blessings that come to us as we grow older and what we have to offer that might be beneficial to others.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: Harris and Trump change their campaign plans after Hurricane Helene's destruction
item.description: Hurricane Helene is scrambling the presidential candidates' plans this week. Democratic nominee Kamala Harris is cutting short a campaign visit to Las Vegas to return to Washington for briefings. Republican candidate Donald Trump is heading to Georgia to see the storm's impact.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, JILL COLVIN and CHRISTINE FERNANDO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here are the rules for the Vance-Walz CBS debate
item.description: The debate, which will kick off at 9 p.m. EDT on Tuesday from the network’s New York office, will be moderated by CBS anchor Norah O’Donnell and "Face the Nation" host Margaret Brennan.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: PIX Panel discusses historic indictment against Mayor Adams
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – History was made in New York City this week when Eric Adams became the city’s first sitting mayor to be indicted on federal charges. A federal indictment charged Adams with bribery, campaign finance and conspiracy offenses.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11
